title: API: GET /api/profile (read current user profile)

task.description: Implement GET /api/profile to return the authenticated user’s profile in camelCase, or null when no row exists. Enforce auth via shared helper and ensure response includes only contract fields.
acceptance_criteria: Unauthenticated GET /api/profile returns 401 with JSON containing error.code.
Authenticated user with no user_profiles row receives 200 with body.profile === null.
Authenticated user with a profile receives 200 with body.profile.nickname as a string and body.profile.ageGroup/preferredTone/primaryPlatform matching stored values.
Response uses camelCase keys (ageGroup, preferredTone, primaryPlatform, createdAt, updatedAt) and does not include userId or id.

definition_of_done: Route uses requireAuthUser and model helper (no raw session handling inside handler).
No data from other users can be returned.
api_contract: GET /api/profile {} → {profile: {nickname, ageGroup, preferredTone, primaryPlatform, createdAt, updatedAt} | null} | 401 {error}
